steps.title: Identify the passage's organizing signal
steps.content: The passage moves from introducing the silversword alliance to explaining its diversity: all species descended from one ancestor and diversified through adaptation. This emphasis on explanation signals the main purpose.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Choice A directly states the text's purpose: describe the silversword alliance and explain how the family became so varied. B focuses on an undiscussed habitat, while C and D wrongly extend the scope to all Hawaiian plants. That matches choice A — A is correct.
